state.title: merge-to-main.sh _phase_archive permanently non-functional: archive-closed-tickets.sh deleted but caller not updated
state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Pre-existing finding from main (merge commit review). merge-to-main.sh _phase_archive (lines 1230-1254) still references archive-closed-tickets.sh which was deleted in the v3 cleanup diff. The code has a graceful fallback (prints INFO and skips), so it will not crash, but the archive phase is now permanently non-functional -- closed tickets will never be archived. If archiving is intentionally removed as part of v3 cleanup, the dead _phase_archive code and its _count_closed_tickets helper should be removed entirely. If archiving is still needed, a replacement must be provided. File: plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
